commit.message:
feat(jumia): push Baci stock levels to Jumia (#946)

* feat(jumia): push Baci stock levels to Jumia with manual + auto sync

Add one-way stock sync from Baci to Jumia. Merchants can manually push
stock via a new "Sync Stock" button in the channels dashboard, and stock
also auto-syncs every 5 minutes piggybacked on the order sync cron when
sync_config.stock is enabled.

- DB migration: add baci_stock_at_last_sync and last_stock_synced_at columns
- API route: POST /api/marketplace/jumia/products/stock with batched queries
- UI: Sync Stock button + syncStock() hook function
- Edge function: piggyback stock push after order sync (gated by sync_config)
- Tests: 10 route tests covering auth, validation, stock change detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(jumia): apply CodeRabbit review fixes for stock sync + add negotiation push notifications

- Edge function: replace Promise.allSettled with Promise.all for Supabase error detection, extract duplicate stockPayload
- Stock route test: add variant-level mapping test exercising mockVariantsIn path
- syncStock: align error handling with syncOrders (include data.details)
- client-page: add void prefix to fire-and-forget refetch() calls
- expo-push: add notifyNegotiationRequest and notifyNegotiationResponse functions
- webhook: fix notification amount to include shipping_fee in chat order total

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: apply CodeRabbit round 3 — error fallbacks, consistent formatting, test coverage

- syncStock/syncOrders: guard against undefined data.error when data.details is present
- notifyNegotiationRequest: use 'orders' channel for high-priority delivery
- notifyNegotiationRequest: use consistent Intl.NumberFormat for currentPrice
- expo-push tests: add error handling (Supabase error, Expo API failure, token invalidation)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(expo-push): extract shared formatCurrency helper, strengthen test assertions

- Extract module-level formatCurrency() replacing 8 inline Intl.NumberFormat calls
- Assert token passed to .in() in DeviceNotRegistered test for comprehensive coverage
- Add error handling tests: Supabase query error, Expo API failure
- Guard syncOrders/syncStock against undefined data.error when details present

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(expo-push): guard against division by zero in notifyPriceDrop

Prevents "Infinity% Off!" title when oldPrice is 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(deps): bump path-to-regexp override to >=8.4.0 (fixes 2 Dependabot alerts)

Resolves ReDoS vulnerabilities via sequential optional groups (high)
and multiple wildcards (medium) in path-to-regexp <8.4.0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(push): extract negotiation notifications to dedicated module

- Move notifyNegotiationRequest/notifyNegotiationResponse to
  negotiation-notifications.ts (one-utility-per-file convention)
- Export formatCurrency from expo-push for reuse
- Fix !currentPrice falsy check → currentPrice == null (0 is valid)
- Guard divide-by-zero in discount calc when currentPrice === 0
- Update all import sites and mocks
- Add 8 colocated tests including zero-price edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Preselect all medicines in new pain entries

Make new pain-form entries start with every configured medicine option selected by default, while preserving existing medicines when editing saved entries and when the user has already touched the form. Reuse the same default-value builder for the initial form state and reset paths so the behavior stays consistent across create, save, and cancel flows.

Closes #40

commit.message:
fix(push): rewrite push notification system with expo-server-sdk (#943)

* fix(push): rewrite push notification system with expo-server-sdk, app_type filtering, and missing triggers

Migrate from manual fetch to expo-server-sdk for token validation, chunking,
and receipt polling. Add app_type column filtering so merchant notifications
only reach admin tokens and customer notifications only reach storefront tokens.
Wire up missing push triggers for POD/invoice/wallet orders, Credit Direct and
Juicyway webhooks, product reviews, and negotiation requests/responses. Add
receipt polling cron, stale token cleanup, and iOS release hardening config plugin.
Remove unused firebase-admin.ts and tracked Firebase config secrets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(push): address CodeRabbit review findings for push notification system

- Fail-closed CRON_SECRET check, fetchError → 500, named Expo import in cron route
- Try/catch + error responses in notify-negotiation and negotiations/notify routes
- Scoped query (.eq merchant_id) prevents cross-merchant notification injection
- EXPO_ACCESS_TOKEN warning when missing, surface processTickets storage errors
- LIBRARY_SEARCH_PATHS preservation + APNs env based on EAS build profile
- Fix Notifications race condition with async-ready pattern in storefront hook
- Replace hardcoded merchant_id with prop in NegotiationModal + update 4 callers
- Fix juicyway hardcoded NGN → use order.currency, chat order amount includes shipping
- Add negotiationId param to notifyNegotiationResponse for deep-link support
- Add app_type passthrough assertions in push-tokens/register tests
- Add NegotiationModal failure path test, update all affected test assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(push): address CodeRabbit review round 2 — error handling, type safety, and guards

- Independent try/catch for notifyNewOrder/notifyPaymentReceived in all webhook after() callbacks
- Separate 500 vs 401 for missing INTERNAL_API_SECRET in notify-negotiation endpoint
- Guard NegotiationModal rendering with merchant?.id check (prevents empty-string FK)
- Add merchantId early guard in submitMerchantRequest (prevents DB constraint violation)
- Handle getUser() auth errors in NegotiationModal (log and continue as guest)
- Remove redundant cleanup_old_push_tickets RPC calls (single invocation per cron run)
- Replace any types with proper expo-notifications types in storefront push hook
- Fix LIBRARY_SEARCH_PATHS tokenizer to respect quoted paths with spaces + handle array input
- Await customer notification in admin negotiations (surface errors instead of swallowing)
- Add negotiation deep link support (negotiation_id → detail, productSlug → product page)
- Extract orderNum in orders route to deduplicate 3 identical computations
- Add deactivation error handling in expo-push.ts token cleanup
- Remove dead mock variables in expo-push.test.ts
- Add app_type default assertion in push-tokens register test
- Add missing-secret 500 test for notify-negotiation endpoint
- New test files: CartSidebar.test.tsx, cart.test.tsx (7 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(push): address CodeRabbit review round 3 — env guards, merchantId validation, cleanup

- Add client-side access guards for EXPO_ACCESS_TOKEN and INTERNAL_API_SECRET
- Add missing serverEnv mapping for INTERNAL_API_SECRET and EXPO_ACCESS_TOKEN (critical: getters returned undefined without this)
- Add merchantId early guard in all 3 NegotiationModal variants (web + 2 mobile)
- Guard NegotiationModal rendering with merchant?.id in CartSidebar, cart-page, cart
- Add React type import in cart.test.tsx and CartSidebar.test.tsx
- Add beforeEach vi.clearAllMocks() in CartSidebar test for isolation
- Fix misleading comment on failed tickets update (individual, not batched)
- Replace console.error with structured logger in negotiations/notify
- Extract variables outside after() callback in juicyway webhook for consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(push): apply CodeRabbit round 4 — security, correctness, and test coverage

- Timing-safe secret comparison in cron routes (cleanup-push-tokens, push-receipts)
- Chunk failure tracking in receipt polling (returns 207 on partial failure)
- Cleanup RPC error checking with cleaned: true/false response
- Discriminated union schema for notify-negotiation (single requires itemName/currentPrice)
- Negotiations/notify uses DB status instead of client input, validates resolution
- Credit Direct webhook uses validated totalAmount instead of raw order.total
- Conditional notifyNewOrder for POD/invoice/wallet only (prevents duplicate notifications)
- Persistent session_id via sessionStorage in NegotiationModal
- Fire-and-forget fetch in handle-negotiation edge function
- LIBRARY_SEARCH_PATHS created when missing, IPHONEOS_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET set
- Singular 'negotiation' push navigation case in admin app
- Hardcoded type="single" → type={negotiationState.type} in cart-page
- RTL accessible queries in NegotiationModal tests, no-merchant guard tests
- New cart-page.test.tsx for stop hook compliance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(admin): repair missing RPC functions for admin analytics dashboard (#945)

The admin dashboard at usebaci.com/admin failed to load due to Postgres
permission errors on materialized views merchant_health and platform_growth.

- Re-create get_admin_merchant_health() RPC to fix environment drift
- Create get_admin_platform_growth() RPC wrapper for platform_growth view
- Remove dead fallback code in admin-merchant-health.ts
- Replace direct platform_growth table query with RPC call
- Update tests to reflect RPC-only access pattern

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(push): apply CodeRabbit round 5 — timing-safe auth, test coverage, edge function guards

- Add timing-safe secret comparison in notify-negotiation internal route
- Create colocated test file for cleanup-push-tokens cron route (6 tests)
- Add mockRpc cleanup assertion to push-receipts delivered test
- Add vi.clearAllMocks() to cart.test.tsx beforeEach
- Guard record.item_info access for type='single' in handle-negotiation edge function

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(admin): align return type with implementation in getAdminMerchantHealthRows

Data is never null due to ?? [] fallback — remove | null from return type.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: tighten settings layout

Closes #34

Co-authored-by: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

fix(browser): dev-browser recipe overhaul (#98)

* fix(browser): dev-browser recipe overhaul — filechooser upload, strict errors, QuickJS compat

Complete rewrite of the dev-browser ChatGPT recipe after extensive dogfood testing
with GPT-5.4-Pro Extended (470KB source bundle e2e).

Browser connection:
- Fix command_is_available() to use --help (dev-browser doesn't support --version)
- Add npm prefix -g fallback for finding dev-browser when not in PATH
- Auth check uses #prompt-textarea element (text markers drift with UI updates)
- Skip page-level auth check before recipe (interferes with subsequent session)
- Recover stdout from QuickJS GC crash on sandbox disposal

File upload (filechooser flow):
- Replace DataTransfer hack with native filechooser (+ button → menu → setFiles)
- Manual UTF-8 encoder (no TextEncoder/btoa in QuickJS sandbox)
- Buffer.from(new Uint8Array(bytes)) — Buffer.from(string) is base64 in sandbox
- Fixed 5s wait after upload (polling evaluate disrupts React state)

Text input & send:
- keyboard.type() with delay (fill/execCommand bypass ProseMirror React state)
- browser.newPage() per run (named pages accumulate stale ChatGPT state)
- page.evaluate() args for ASSISTANT_COUNT (Playwright runs in browser context)

Error handling (GPT-5.4-Pro review findings):
- Strict check_chatgpt_auth() JSON parsing (no more unwrap_or(json!({})))
- Strict run_chatgpt_recipe() response validation (fail on missing response)
- Lazy bundle text read in main.rs (only in paste mode)
- Model selection 5s timeout + warning-only fallback
- Scoped error detection (querySelector on error elements, not full page body)

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style: cargo fmt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
chore(BUB-155): harden CI and package governance (#117)

* chore(BUB-155): harden repo governance config

Summary:
- pin GitHub Actions workflows to approved full SHAs
- add explicit workspace/package metadata for ghost dependency checks
- switch root npm registry config to public npm and add repo governance test

Rationale:
- enforce immutable action refs and explicit package/tooling declarations
- align root publish defaults with the public npm registry
- preserve issue progress while full repo gates remain blocked by baseline build/test instability

Tests:
- pass: cd packages/cli && npx vitest run test/unit/repo-governance.spec.ts --reporter=verbose
- fail: npm test (pre-existing core/otlp-core dist gate instability)
- fail: npm run check (repo-wide check instability under current baseline)

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

* fix(BUB-155): export workspace package entrypoints

Summary:
- add root package exports for core, otlp-core, and backend-langfuse
- extend the repo governance test to assert workspace dependency and export
  contracts
- update progress notes with the export follow-up

Rationale:
- keep NodeNext workspace consumers aligned with explicit dist entrypoints
- lock the ghost-dependency hardening work behind an automated regression test

Tests:
- npx vitest run packages/cli/test/unit/repo-governance.spec.ts --config
  packages/cli/vitest.config.ts
- npm exec tsc -- --project packages/cli/tsconfig.runtime.json --noEmit
- npm run --workspace @bububuger/backend-langfuse check

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

* fix(BUB-155): export workspace package entrypoints

Summary:
- add explicit root export maps for core, otlp-core, and backend-langfuse
- normalize esbuild entry paths to ./dist/index.js in CLI and plugin builds
- extend repo governance coverage for workspace exports and import-backed deps

Rationale:
- package-name imports need stable dist/type entrypoints across workspace builds
- explicit relative esbuild entry paths reduce resolution ambiguity in build scripts
- keep ghost dependency and package entry guarantees enforced in one repo-level spec

Tests:
- pass: ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run packages/cli/test/unit/repo-governance.spec.ts
- fail: npm run check (pre-existing workspace build instability tracked in BUB-160)
- fail: npm test (pre-existing workspace build instability tracked in BUB-160)

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

feat(linear): automate service request portal kanban setup (#22)

* feat(linear): automate backlog import and dependency linking

Summary:
- align the kanban docs and generated status suggestion to the existing
  elixir Linear workflow using Backlog as the intake state
- add a bundle importer that creates issues with project, milestone,
  label, priority, and state metadata from linear_import_rich.csv
- add a dependency linker that applies blocked-by relations from the
  generated dependency CSV using the import manifest

Rationale:
- the repo previously described a Triage/Ready-style workflow that did
  not match the actual Linear team states used by Symphony automation
- importing from the generated bundle needed a repeatable path that
  preserves milestone and label structure without manual setup drift
- blocker links should be reproducible from source data so the backlog
  can be rebuilt safely before execution kickoff

Tests:
- python3 project/linear/tools/build_linear_import_bundle.py
- python3 -m py_compile project/linear/tools/import_linear_bundle.py
  project/linear/tools/link_linear_dependencies.py
  project/linear/tools/upload_linear_backlog.py
  project/linear/tools/build_linear_import_bundle.py
- importer dry run and real import against Linear project
  Service Request Portal MVP (44 issues created)
- dependency linker dry run and real apply against the generated
  manifest (97 blocker relations created)

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

* fix(workflow): point tracker at service request portal project

Summary:
- update WORKFLOW.md frontmatter to use the new Service Request Portal
  MVP Linear project slug

Rationale:
- the workflow frontmatter still pointed at the old hello-world project
  and would target the wrong Linear project for unattended runs
- the imported kanban backlog now lives in the Service Request Portal
  MVP project and the tracker metadata must match it

Tests:
- not run (frontmatter-only metadata change)

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
fix(deps): override path-to-regexp to >=0.1.13 to resolve ReDoS CVE (#942)

CVE-2026-4867 (GHSA-37ch-88jc-xwx2): path-to-regexp < 0.1.13 is vulnerable
to Regular Expression Denial of Service via multiple route parameters.
The vulnerable version was pulled in transitively by express@4.22.1 via
@copilotkitnext/runtime. Override resolves all instances to 8.3.0.

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(chatview): harden pi chat and no-focus desktop automation

Summary:
- extract chat model selection into a dedicated controller and
  centralize setup prompt helpers for cleaner chatview ownership
- preserve non-Pi transcript history across Pi sync, reset fresh-chat
  composer state correctly, and clean up duplicate embeddings status
  bars after reloads
- harden the desktop automation bridge, stable-client bootstrap,
  reload/chatview stress runners, and release preflight privacy and
  gitignore safety checks

Rationale:
- keep the Pi-integrated chatview simpler while fixing the real model
  switch, fresh-chat, and transcript continuity regressions exposed by
  live vault testing
- make no-focus Obsidian automation the canonical release-proof path,
  including reload churn, bridge recovery, and duplicate-status-bar
  detection
- block local-only, secret-like, or missing-ignore release hazards
  before version tagging and release publication

Tests:
- git diff --check
- git check-ignore -v .env.local .codex/diagnostics/check-plugin-fast-debug-20260224-015345.log .codex/diagnostics/check-plugin-fast-debug-20260224-015444.log .codex/diagnostics/check-plugin-fast-verbose-20260224-015427.log
- npm run check:plugin:fast
- npm run build
- npm test
- node --test testing/native/desktop-automation/bootstrap.test.mjs testing/native/desktop-automation/client.test.mjs testing/native/desktop-automation/runner.test.mjs
- npm run sync:local
- node scripts/reload-local-obsidian-plugin.mjs
- npm run test:native:desktop:chatview-stress
- npm run test:native:desktop:stress
- node scripts/release-plugin.mjs --dry-run --version 5.3.0
  --allow-dirty --notes-file docs/release-notes/5.3.0.md

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
perf(mobile-storefront): migrate FlatList to FlashList v2 (#940)

* fix(deps): override node-forge to 1.4.0 to resolve 4 high CVEs

Adds pnpm override for node-forge (via @unlighthouse/cli → listhen)
to fix signature forgery, DoS, and certificate bypass vulnerabilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(channels): restore jumia logo asset

* fix: address CodeRabbit review feedback on PR 939

- Move jumia-logo.png into src/assets and use @/ alias import
- Pin node-forge override to exact version 1.4.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* perf(mobile-storefront): migrate FlatList to FlashList v2 across 8 screens

Replace FlatList with @shopify/flash-list (v2) in all eligible list screens
for better virtualization and recycling performance. FlashList v2 auto-measures
items, so no estimatedItemSize needed. Also removes FlatList-specific perf
hacks (removeClippedSubviews, maxToRenderPerBatch, windowSize, getItemLayout,
columnWrapperStyle) that FlashList handles internally.

Migrated: category, search, orders, notifications, receipts, saved (tab + page),
SearchOverlay.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* perf(mobile): upgrade @shopify/flash-list 2.0.2 → 2.3.1 and migrate ChatModal

- Bump flash-list to 2.3.1 in both mobile-storefront and mobile-admin
- Migrate ChatModal from FlatList to FlashList (now possible with v2.3.1's
  inverted prop support and FlashListRef type)
- Update use-chat.ts ref type from FlatList to FlashListRef<ChatMessage>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
COE-312: Add session notes, outcome states, and artifact registry (#15)

* feat(session,artifact): add session notes, outcome states, and artifact registry

Summary:
- Add SessionOutcomeState enum (valid, invalid, aborted) to domain models
- Add notes and outcome_state fields to Session domain model and ORM
- Add experiment_id field to Artifact model for experiment-scoped artifacts
- Create database migration 520517cac40b for schema changes
- Update SessionService with outcome state handling and notes support
- Create ArtifactRegistryService for artifact management
- Add ArtifactRepository interface for artifact persistence
- Update session CLI with --notes option on create, --outcome on finalize
- Add session add-notes CLI command for updating notes
- Create artifact CLI commands: register, list, show, remove
- Link artifacts to sessions or experiments (at least one required)

Rationale:
- Operators need to document session context with notes during/after runs
- Outcome states allow marking sessions as invalid/aborted while keeping them
  visible for audit (they can be excluded from comparisons)
- Artifact registry enables attaching exports/reports to sessions or experiments
  for traceability and comparison workflows

Tests:
- make test: 77 tests passed
- make type-check: passed

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

* fix: address review feedback - remove duplicate SessionService, add comprehensive tests

- Remove duplicate SessionService from services_abc.py (keep services/session_service.py)
- Add tests for add-notes CLI command (3 tests)
- Add tests for artifact CLI commands (6 tests)
- Add tests for SQLArtifactRepository (7 tests)
- Add tests for update_session_notes service method (4 tests)
- Fix UUID slicing in artifact list command
- Add ArtifactRegistryService to exports

All 235 tests passing

* fix: remove ArtifactRegistryService due to architectural mismatch

- Removed ArtifactRegistryService from services_abc.py
- The service used domain models but repository expects ORM models
- This is a broader architectural pattern in the codebase
- CLI already uses SQLArtifactRepository directly with proper validation
- Updated exports in services/__init__.py

235 tests passing

* COE-312: Address PR feedback - restore --status parameter, add evidence

- Restore --status parameter to finalize command for backward compatibility
- Add --outcome parameter as optional (defaults to 'valid')
- Add test for --status parameter backward compatibility
- Create EVIDENCE_COE-312.md with CLI examples for all new features
- Fix linting issues with ruff --fix
- All 236 tests passing

* COE-312: Remove developer workflow scripts

- Remove scripts/create_workpad.py (Linear workflow helper)
- Remove scripts/linear_helper.py (Linear API helper)
- These were development tools not part of the benchmark system

---------

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
feat(runtime): add provider route simulation surfaces

Summary:
- add simulation-grade route scoring and explicit budget-steering metadata to
  LLM runtime routing decisions
- project the new route-planning details through operator and activity APIs and
  extend deterministic runtime eval coverage
- update runtime implementation docs to record the shipped branch state and the
  fixed activity-ledger regression

Rationale:
- runtime routing already had weighted scoring and guardrails, but it still
  lacked an inspectable route-planning surface for issue #236
- budget steering was implicit in target order, and the Activity Ledger was
  silently dropping the new routing metadata during projection

Tests:
- git diff --check
- python3 -m py_compile backend/src/llm_runtime.py backend/src/api/activity.py backend/src/api/operator.py backend/src/evals/harness.py backend/tests/test_llm_runtime.py backend/tests/test_activity_api.py backend/tests/test_operator_api.py backend/tests/test_eval_harness.py
- cd backend && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_llm_runtime.py tests/test_activity_api.py tests/test_operator_api.py tests/test_eval_harness.py -q
- cd backend && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_eval_harness.py::test_run_runtime_evals_passes_all_scenarios -q
- cd backend && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_llm_runtime.py tests/test_activity_api.py tests/test_operator_api.py tests/test_eval_harness.py::test_run_runtime_evals_passes_all_scenarios tests/test_eval_harness.py::test_runtime_eval_scenarios_expose_expected_details -q
- cd docs && npm run build

commit.message:
fix(mobile-storefront): fix Colors type import in product-card types (#941)

Use `import type Colors` with `(typeof Colors)['light']` to correctly
reference the color scheme type. The previous `import type { default as Colors }`
with `Colors['light']` caused TS2749 since TypeScript treated Colors as a value.

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
🎨 Palette: [UX improvement] Improve PhoneInput accessibility (#934)

* 🎨 Palette: [UX improvement] Improve PhoneInput accessibility

* What: Added proper accessibility attributes to the country selector modal and touchables in PhoneInput component.
* Why: Complex React Native custom form controls with decorative elements cause screen reader noise by individually reading them. Grouping elements inside TouchableOpacity with specific roles and hints improves UX.
* Accessibility:
  - Added accessibilityRole="button", accessibilityLabel, accessibilityHint, and activeOpacity={0.7} to the country selector button.
  - Added accessibilityRole="header" to the modal header text.
  - Hid decorative icons, flags, and duplicated text inside the country button and country row touchables using accessibilityElementsHidden={true} and importantForAccessibility="no".
  - Added accessibilityState={{ selected: true/false }} to country row options.
* Impact: Enhances accessibility for screen reader users selecting country codes within the mobile storefront app.

Co-authored-by: ogabasseyy <196925138+ogabasseyy@users.noreply.github.com>

* style(mobile-storefront): fix indentation in PhoneInput accessibility props

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
